definition: Unique market tickers in the metadata universe that resolve inside the fixed date window.
Unique market tickers in the metadata universe that are binary and have an explicit Yes/No outcome.
Unique market tickers with both open_time and close_time present and ordered correctly.
Unique sampled market tickers after stratified sampling.
Unique sampled market tickers with candle files retrieved.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 1-day tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 6-hour tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a matched candle within the 1-hour tolerance window.
Unique sampled market tickers with a final usable candle before market close.
